sections.paragraph:
fut. יֶחֱוַר to be white; hence to become pale (as the face), Isa 29:22. Aram. ܚܘܰܪ, חֲוַר id.; Arab. with Waw quiescent, حَارَ to be bleached (of a garment). Hence חֹור, חוּר No. I, and חִוָּר, חֹרִי.

[“(2) figuratively, to be splendid, noble, i.q. חָרַר No. 2. See traces of this signification in הוּרָה, חִירָם .” Thes.]
